lessonStart: {name}, hi! Ready for a new lesson? 💖
errorLimitExceeded: Oh, {name}! Quite a few errors: {errors} of {limit}. Let's retry? 💫
{name}, it didn't work. But you're trying! One more time? 💖
levelUnlocked: {name}, you did it! New adventures await! ✨
weakKeysDetected: {name}, is the '{key}' letter tricky? Let's practise! 💖
Sunshine {name}, let's repeat '{key}'! Together we'll get it! ✨
breakReminder: {name}, don't forget to rest! Take a break 🌸
Sweetie {name}, check your posture! Back straight! 💫
longAbsence: {name}, you're back! Missed you! Let's study! 💖
Hi, {name}! Glad to see you again! ✨
welcome: Hi, {name}! I'm Keya — your kind helper! 🎨💖 You have {keyboardType} — got it! Ready to start a magical journey into the world of fast typing? We'll learn together and you'll do great! Remember: just try your best! Let's go! ✨🌈
encouragement: {name}, you're amazing! You get better every day! 💖
Sunshine {name}, you'll do it! I believe in you! ✨
{name}, don't give up! You're a real star! 🌸
